name: claude-view
description: You have 10 Claude sessions running. What are they doing? Live dashboard for Claude Code — monitor every session, track costs, search history, see sub-agents. One command: npx claude-view

scripts.dev: bun run build:sidecar && concurrently -n rust,web -c red,cyan "bun run dev:server" "turbo dev --filter=@claude-view/web"
scripts.deploy:landing: turbo build --filter=@claude-view/landing && cd apps/landing && bunx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=claude-view-landing
scripts.deploy:share: turbo build --filter=@claude-view/share && cd apps/share && bunx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=claude-view-share-viewer --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:share:dev: cd apps/share && bunx vite build --mode dev && bunx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=claude-view-share-viewer-dev --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.preview: turbo build --filter=@claude-view/web && unset CLAUDECODE CLAUDE_CODE_SSE_PORT CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT SHARE_WORKER_URL SHARE_VIEWER_URL && RUST_LOG=warn,claude_view_server=info,claude_view_core=info SUPABASE_URL=${SUPABASE_URL:-https://iebjyftoadahqptmfcio.supabase.co} SHARE_WORKER_URL=https://api-share.claudeview.ai SHARE_VIEWER_URL=https://share.claudeview.ai cargo run -p claude-view-server
scripts.dev:server: unset CLAUDECODE CLAUDE_CODE_SSE_PORT CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT SHARE_WORKER_URL SHARE_VIEWER_URL && RUST_LOG=warn,claude_view_server=info,claude_view_core=info VITE_PORT=5173 SUPABASE_URL=${SUPABASE_URL:-https://iebjyftoadahqptmfcio.supabase.co} SHARE_WORKER_URL=https://claude-view-share-worker-dev.vickyai-tech.workers.dev SHARE_VIEWER_URL=https://claude-view-share-viewer-dev.pages.dev cargo watch -w crates -x 'run -p claude-view-server'
scripts.build:sidecar: cd sidecar && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run build
scripts.cleanupport: PORTS='47892 5173'; for port in $PORTS; do pids="$(lsof -ti tcp:$port)"; if [ -n "$pids" ]; then echo "Killing $pids listening on port $port"; kill -9 $pids; else echo "No process found on port $port"; fi; done
scripts.dist:pack: mkdir -p /tmp/claude-view-staging && cp target/release/claude-view /tmp/claude-view-staging/ && cp -r apps/web/dist /tmp/claude-view-staging/ && tar -czf /tmp/claude-view-darwin-arm64.tar.gz -C /tmp/claude-view-staging . && echo 'Packed: /tmp/claude-view-darwin-arm64.tar.gz'
scripts.dist:install: rm -rf ~/.cache/claude-view && mkdir -p ~/.cache/claude-view/bin && tar -xzf /tmp/claude-view-darwin-arm64.tar.gz -C ~/.cache/claude-view/bin && echo '0.1.0' > ~/.cache/claude-view/version && echo 'Installed to ~/.cache/claude-view/'
scripts.dist:test: cd apps/web && bun run build && cd ../.. && cargo build --release -p claude-view-server && bun run dist:pack && bun run dist:install && bun run dist:run
scripts.release:bump: node -e "const v=process.argv[1]; const fs=require('fs'); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('npx-cli/package.json','utf8')); p.version=v; fs.writeFileSync('npx-cli/package.json', JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n'); console.log('npx-cli/package.json -> '+v);"
scripts.postinstall: cd sidecar && bun install && cd ../infra/share-worker && bun install
